pageContext.name: Halo Gaming Locker
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Numskull are proud to present the Halo Gaming Locker!   Gear up your gaming station for Halo Infinite and get ready to join Master Chief for a whole lot of galactic warfare. Able to hold up to 10 of your favorite, Xbox games or PlayStation games, or movies, this locker features compartments to hold all your essentials such as controllers, cables, and more. Not to mention it'll securely mount your headphones on the top.  This is the perfect Halo gaming accessory to keep all your games and accessories organized.
